body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
* Makes microphysics implicit
* Tweaks limiters
* Makes (lognormal) quadrature default
* Needs (small) allocation increase because of additional Jacobian terms
* 2M microphysics is not fully implicit yet (requires larger changes to Jacobian structure for number density terms)

Maybe the third time's a charm...
-->

title: Make microphysics implicit v3
